headline: Simon Property Group (SPG) Downgraded at Wolfe Research. Here is Why
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 3.89%, Simon Property Group, Inc. (NYSE:SPG) is included among the 14 Best Blue Chip Dividend Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds.
